LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER CHASE MANHATTAN BANK'S PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT OR VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED (TOTAL AWARD-$785.77). NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-06-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
